SEARCH
Package edu.touro.mco152.bm.persist

Class DiskRun

java.lang.Object
edu.touro.mco152.bm.persist.DiskRun
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
@Entity public class DiskRun extends Object implements Serializable
Stores information about the results of a single disk write/read test

  • Method Details

    • findAll

      public static List<DiskRun> findAll()
      Gets a list of all the disk transactions done so far
      Returns:
      a list of all the disk transaction done, stored as DiskRun objects

    • deleteAll

      public static int deleteAll()
      Deletes the history of all disk transactions done so far
      Returns:
      the number of disk transactions deleted
